summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No merge_candidate is safe because the artifact lacks complete merge preflight proof and each open PR has an unresolved blocker: latest ClawSweeper needs-changes/found-issues signal, active waiting-on-author state, or failing required checks.

actions.reason: Needs maintainer or refreshed full review artifact before merge because the latest review-bot state still says needs changes and the hydrated excerpt does not prove the finding was resolved.
Needs maintainer or refreshed full review artifact because the latest review-bot result is unresolved and the message-delivery behavior change has compatibility risk.
Needs maintainer decision and/or refreshed repair job because current hydrated checks fail and the provider model availability/routing change is not mergeable from this preflight.
Needs human or author follow-up because the job explicitly requires human review for active author follow-up and the PR is labeled waiting on author with unresolved review/update signals.
Needs maintainer or refreshed full review artifact before merge because the latest review-bot state is unresolved despite otherwise clean checks and a narrow diff.

needs_human: #77904: latest ClawSweeper state says needs changes before merge; compact artifact does not include enough detail to prove resolution.
#78606: latest ClawSweeper state says found issues before merge on a compatibility/message-delivery change.
#84545: required proof/checks fail and provider model routing likely needs maintainer review before repair or merge.
#78741: status is waiting on author with maintainer update-needed comment and unresolved ClawSweeper needs-changes state.
#78747: latest ClawSweeper state says found issues before merge; compact artifact does not include the full finding or resolved proof.
